title: Property Consultant - JLL India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - JLL India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
